DataRequest.Name: User logon with privileges / SCW
DataRequest.Description: This rule tracks users that logged in with privileged access, as in with administrative powers

SubPattern.name: Normal_login
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-4624" AND (user!="SYSTEM" AND user CONTAIN "DWM" AND user CONTAIN "$")

SubPattern.name: Windows_login_with_privs
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-4672" AND (user NOT CONTAIN "$" AND user!="SYSTEM")

DataRequest.IncidentTitle: A login of the user $user with high privileges was spotted on $srcName via $winLogonType
